updateNote: Day 81 (5:06 PM PDT May 18 / midnight UTC May 19): MAJOR — Trump discloses planned May 19 Iran strike and calls it off at Gulf states' request (Qatar Emir, Saudi Crown Prince MBS, UAE President). Pentagon kept on 'moment's notice' standby. Iran fires 4 missile salvos at Israel (all intercepted). Houthis declare maritime blockade on Haifa port. NSC Situation Room meeting held. Pezeshkian: Iran's nuclear enrichment rights non-negotiable. Pakistan's FM Naqvi shuttled Tehran–Washington as mediator. Brent $111.19 (+1.77%), WTI $107.35 (+1.52%). Gas $4.515/gal (+42.0%). Hormuz Blockade Day 78.
